Validation Tools for PIK-PIAM

Source: R/piamValidation-package.R
piamValidation-package.Rd

The piamValidation package provides validation tools for the Potsdam Integrated Assessment Modelling environment.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/pik-piam/piamValidation

  • https://pik-piam.github.io/piamValidation

Author

Maintainer: Pascal Weigmann pascal.weigmann@pik-potsdam.de (ORCID) (Potsdam Institute for Climate Impact Research)
